name_en: Camphor Tree of the Toda Family Residence
description_en: A camphor tree designated as a natural monument in the monuments category (historic sites, places of scenic beauty, and natural monuments). It is municipally designated by Akiruno City, Tokyo, with designation dated November 3, 1975.

description_en: A wisteria designated as a natural monument in the monuments category (historic sites, places of scenic beauty, and natural monuments). It is municipally designated by Akiruno City, Tokyo, with designation dated November 3, 1975. It is located at Ninomiya 1189.
